summary: Editorial text hero is correct for this salon (off-domain photo was suppressed); gallery is vivid and on-category. One buried tile is slightly soft.

findings.issue: Hero is the editorial (photo-less) variant because the only candidate hero was an off-domain landscape — the gate routed it to a composed text hero. This is the intended fallback, not a defect.
findings.fix: To add a photo hero, drop a real salon-interior shot at src/assets/prospects/joon-hair/hero.<ext>.

findings.issue: Gallery photo-5 reads slightly soft/low-contrast versus its neighbours.
findings.fix: Drop it or swap for a sharper, higher-contrast salon shot.
